_comment: Multi-harness plugin hooks (Claude Code + Factory Droid). Both auto-discover this root file and use the same Stop/UserPromptSubmit/PostToolUse event names; the command resolves from whichever plugin-root variable the running harness sets (Claude: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT, Factory: DROID_PLUGIN_ROOT), and ship.sh re-derives the real root from its own path regardless. Codex and Cursor are wired from their own manifest hooks paths (hooks/codex.json, hooks/cursor.json). Gemini is NOT wired here: Claude's loader rejects Gemini's AfterAgent/BeforeAgent/AfterTool event names in this shared file, and Gemini can only read hooks from this same path — see docs/gemini.md.
